valueString.value: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

description.value: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for routine laboratory panel. Captures comprehensive blood chemistry, hematology, and urinalysis data for spaceflight crew members.

purpose.value: To assess pre- and postflight clinical laboratory values for comprehensive health assessment of spaceflight crew members

copyright.value: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

valueString.value: To obtain comprehensive clinical laboratory data for health assessment, establish baselines, and monitor for spaceflight-related physiological changes.
Complete blood count, comprehensive metabolic panel, lipid panel, urinalysis
Fasting blood draw and urine collection for comprehensive laboratory analysis.
AME L-9/6 m, L-60 to L-10 days

display.value: Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by Automated count
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Urea nitrogen [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Carbon dioxide, total [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

text.value: No routine in-flight laboratory collection for this MRID
